basics.name: Sahil Chhabra
basics.title: Passionate about Circuits | Cadence Virtuoso | Mixed Signal Designing
basics.summary: I am a B.Tech undergraduate with a deep focus on VLSI Design, driven by a passion for bridging the gap between hardware intelligence and cutting-edge automation. Experienced in Mixed Signal Design and proficient with industry-standard tools like Cadence Virtuoso and Verilog, I have built a strong foundation in crafting circuits that operate at the intersection of analog precision and digital logic. I am fascinated by the evolving role of AI in chip design and verification, constantly exploring how intelligent systems can accelerate and elevate the future of semiconductor engineering.

experience.company: Chip Crafters - The VLSI Club of VIPS-TC

items: Design of 8-Bit ALU focusing on Low-Power and Low-Temperature conditions in Cadence Virtuoso at 180 nm Technology.
Design of Adiabatic AND & NAND gates using Transmission Gates in Cadence Virtuoso at 180nm Technology.
Design and Stability Analysis of a 6T-SRAM Cell using Butterfly Curve (Static Noise Margin) in Cadence Virtuoso.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology - BTech in Electronics Engineering specialization in VLSI (Very Large Scale Integration)
